title: Ability to select and merge items
excerpt:
Description
As a way to manage duplicates, it would make sense to be able to select two or more items and merge them rather than only working from the “Manage Duplicates” window.

posts.author: alexar (Alexa Reardon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

As a way to manage duplicates, it would make sense to be able to select two or more items and merge them rather than only working from the “Manage Duplicates” window.

What are you trying to achieve

Easily manage duplicates when found.
